fixtures.name: AgentChat OpenClaw Channel
fixtures.why: Production-shaped channel plugin with WebSocket auth, reconnect, prompt hints, and typed runtime contracts.

fixtures.name: WeCom Enhanced Channel
fixtures.why: Large community channel fixture covering WS streaming, group/DM policy, command allowlists, media, and dynamic agents.

fixtures.name: QQbot
fixtures.why: QQ Bot channel fixture covering rich media, proactive messaging, cron/reminder tools, and preload-based SDK/runtime compatibility.

fixtures.name: A2A Gateway
fixtures.why: Agent-to-agent server fixture with agent-card discovery, JSON-RPC/REST/gRPC transports, metrics, peer auth, and async task modes.

fixtures.name: HasData
fixtures.why: Single native tool backed by a large OpenAPI-derived action catalog and strict per-action schemas.

fixtures.name: MCP Adapter
fixtures.why: Dynamic tool discovery from MCP servers with stdio/http transports and schema passthrough.

fixtures.name: Phoenix LLM Trace
fixtures.why: Small sharp fixture for llm_input/llm_output access and raw prompt/output privacy boundaries.

fixtures.name: Opik OpenClaw
fixtures.why: Opik trace exporter covering LLM spans, tool spans, subagent spans, stale trace cleanup, CLI setup, and persisted tool-result sanitization.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Telemetry
fixtures.why: Telemetry fixture covering high-volume lifecycle hooks, tool-call capture, message events, JSONL/syslog sinks, redaction, rate limiting, and integrity hash chains.

fixtures.name: Lossless Claw (LCM)
fixtures.why: Lossless context-management fixture covering context engine registration, DAG compaction tools, prompt assembly hooks, session cleanup, and gateway maintenance lifecycle.

fixtures.name: ConnectClaw
fixtures.why: Contacts/messaging plugin with dynamic tool factories, command handlers, a polling service that wakes agents via the OpenClaw CLI, and a Hono relay package in the same repo.

fixtures.name: Hyperspell OpenClaw
fixtures.why: Memory and context fixture covering CLI setup, command handlers, and tool-backed external memory search/write.

fixtures.name: Honcho OpenClaw
fixtures.why: Memory-runtime fixture covering plugin-entry aliases, memory runtime/prompt-section registration, gateway lifecycle, subagent capture, and managed external memory tools.

fixtures.name: Composio OpenClaw
fixtures.why: NPM-installed Composio/MCP fixture covering prompt context injection, CLI setup, external API auth, and dynamic remote tool catalogs.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Kitchen Sink
fixtures.why: Credential-free generated fixture covering the public OpenClaw plugin API surface across hooks, registrars, provider capabilities, setup metadata, manifest contracts, and SDK import compatibility.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw BlueBubbles channel plugin

fixtures.name: OpenClaw diagnostics OpenTelemetry exporter

fixtures.why: Official OpenClaw Discord channel package covering subagent routing hooks, message policy, account auth, and npm artifact packaging from the monorepo.

fixtures.name: Lobster workflow tool plugin (typed pipelines + resumable approvals)
fixtures.why: Official Lobster workflow package covering typed pipeline tools, resumable approval semantics, manifest tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.why: Official bundled OpenClaw Matrix channel package covering CLI setup, gateway methods, and subagent routing hooks; Crabpot source-packs it from the OpenClaw monorepo instead of requiring a separate npm dist-tag.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Microsoft Teams channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official Microsoft Teams channel package covering enterprise chat auth, channel factory metadata, message policy, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Nextcloud Talk channel plugin

fixtures.why: Official Nostr channel package covering encrypted DM channel behavior, HTTP route registration, account auth, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw voice-call plugin
fixtures.why: Official voice-call package covering gateway methods, service lifecycle, tool registration, config migration, CLI setup, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Zalo channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official Zalo channel package covering account auth, media-capable channel metadata, channel factory registration, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.why: Official Zalo personal account package covering native zca-js integration, channel factory registration, tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Feishu/Lark channel plugin (community maintained by @m1heng)
fixtures.why: Official Feishu/Lark channel package covering subagent routing hooks, account auth, tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.why: Official Tlon/Urbit channel package covering federated-network account setup, channel factory registration, tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Twitch channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official Twitch channel package covering streaming-chat channel metadata, account auth, message policy, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Google Meet participant plugin
fixtures.why: Official Google Meet package covering meeting tools, gateway methods, node host commands, CLI setup, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw diff viewer plugin
fixtures.why: Official diff viewer package covering prompt mutation, HTTP route UI surface, tool registration, manifest tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw LanceDB-backed long-term memory plugin with auto-recall/capture
fixtures.why: Official LanceDB memory package covering automatic recall/capture hooks, vector-store lifecycle, service/CLI setup, tool contracts, and npm artifact packaging.

fixtures.name: OpenClaw QQ Bot channel plugin

fixtures.name: OpenClaw WhatsApp channel plugin
fixtures.why: Official WhatsApp channel package covering account auth, media-capable channel metadata, message policy, and npm artifact packaging from the monorepo.

fixtures.name: NemoClaw

fixtures.name: TencentDB Agent Memory
fixtures.why: NPM-pinned memory fixture covering automatic recall/capture hooks, TencentDB vector storage, SQLite fallback, cleanup lifecycle, and seed/export CLI commands.

fixtures.name: DingTalk Channel
fixtures.why: DingTalk channel fixture from the latest npm-backed repo, covering enterprise IM auth, channel setup, media handling, and webhook-style message ingress.

fixtures.name: DingTalk Connector
fixtures.why: Official DingTalk connector fixture covering Stream-mode channel ingress, AI Card replies, multi-account access policy, gateway RPC methods, and packaged channel skills.

fixtures.name: DingTalk Doc MCP Tools
fixtures.why: DingTalk document-tool fixture wrapping MCP doc, block, and file operations into OpenClaw tool registrations with tool-call logging hooks; this covers AliDocs automation rather than another chat channel.

fixtures.name: HAPI OpenClaw Adapter
fixtures.why: NPM-pinned HAPI adapter fixture covering a native /hapi gateway route surface, plugin-auth HTTP handlers, and transcript bridge/capture services backed by OpenClaw runtime events; this is a plugin-owned gateway surface rather than another channel or sidecar.

fixtures.name: Mocrane WeCom

fixtures.name: Tencent Yuanbao Bot

fixtures.name: OpenClaw Weixin

fixtures.name: LightClawBot
fixtures.why: NPM-pinned channel fixture covering cron/proactive messaging metadata, file upload tooling, bundled Socket.IO dependencies, and built JavaScript-only plugin packages.

fixtures.name: Telnyx SMS
fixtures.why: Telnyx-owned SMS/MMS channel fixture covering channel setup entries, multi-account phone-number auth, inbound webhook verification, HTTP route registration, MMS handling, and auto-exposure flows.

fixtures.name: ClawRouter

fixtures.name: MemU Engine
fixtures.why: Memory tool fixture with a Python sidecar, OpenClaw session ingestion, filesystem storage migration, and long-running local memory data layout assumptions.

fixtures.name: SecureClaw
fixtures.why: Security fixture covering gateway-start scanning, config and credential hardening, filesystem watch/audit behavior, and CLI-driven remediation/report generation.

fixtures.name: MemOS Cloud OpenClaw Plugin
fixtures.why: Cloud memory fixture covering legacy registerHook compatibility, startup/session-end hooks, config UI service code, env/config precedence, and external MemOS API calls.

fixtures.name: ClawMetry
fixtures.why: Observability fixture for diagnostic events, log transport, telemetry buffering, and plugin-owned dashboard lifecycle.
